brand_strategy.note_to_bot: Only actively sell Conspit and VNM. Simagic is comparison reference. Moza only when Shopify shows live stock. Everything else either coming soon or not carried.

pc_builds.note_to_bot: NEVER QUOTE A PC PRICE from memory or this KB. Component costs change daily. Always say: 'PC is custom build-to-order — let me get you a live quote.' Then escalate.

shopify_reference_only.model: RaceSims Pro-Grade High-Performance sim racing PC

simagic_comparison_only.note_to_bot: Listed on Shopify ONLY so customers can compare specs and price. Do not actively sell. Redirect to Conspit equivalent (Ares Apex 8Nm / Ares 12Nm / Ares Platinum 20Nm).

moza_opportunistic.note_to_bot: Only quote if Shopify shows live stock. Never take preorders. Never commit a timeline. If out of stock, redirect to Conspit Apex Bundle.

coming_soon_do_not_quote.action: Say we're adding them and flag their interest. DO NOT quote prices or dates.
Say we're adding them and flag their interest. DO NOT quote prices or dates.

not_carried.action: If customer names it, say we don't carry Asetek currently; redirect to Conspit Platinum 20Nm or VNM Xtream 32Nm.
If customer names it, redirect to Conspit or VNM equivalent.
If customer names it, say we don't carry Sim-Lab; redirect to Conspit formula cockpits (FP-Lite / FC / FC PRO) or RaceSims GT Sim Cockpit.

payment.emi: Available via Razorpay. No-cost EMI on select credit cards subject to bank offers.
payment.note_to_bot: Never ask for card details. Share Razorpay payment link only after Thambu confirms the quote.

warranty.coverage: Manufacturing defects. Onsite if local to Chennai, else return-to-base. Shipping to RaceSims for RTB is customer's cost; return shipping is ours.

installation.travel_model: Actuals — flight or train + stay for the engineer
installation.quote_line: Installation anywhere in India, ₹25,000 plus actuals for travel.
installation.note_to_bot: NOT Chennai/Bangalore only. Send-install is pan-India.

shipping.packaging: Double-wall boxes, foam-cut for gear; pallet-wrap for rigs

turnaround.in_stock_gear: Ships within 24-48 hrs of payment clearing

returns.policy: No returns on custom builds. Manufacturing defects handled under warranty. Unopened standard items: 7 day return window minus return shipping.

motec_coaching.description: Paid 1:1 MoTeC telemetry coaching session. Public-facing service. Driver sends laps, we analyze braking, throttle, steering traces, line choice, give written + voice feedback.

driver_development.note_to_bot: Do not commit timelines. If asked, say 'we're building a structured driver development program — let me flag your interest.'

b2b_commercial_simulators.description: Enclosed commercial simulators for arcades, malls, corporate events, brand activations. Custom build.

dealer_note_to_bot: These are public. Share if customer is outside Chennai and asks for local options. Always add: 'We can also ship pan-India via Bluedart with install support if you'd prefer direct.'

public_proof_points: RaceSims-built sim installed at Arka's Coimbatore facility where actual championship drivers train
